_meta.generated_by: hand-authored from game-truth + flagged community claims (tools/boss_constraints.py consumes this)
_meta.purpose: Machine-readable per-location HARD FILTERS for a team generator (M4) and the synergy resolver (M2). Every field carries a `source` tag: 'game-truth' (verified against data/static/* or project memory) or 'community' (RSL community knowledge, flagged for later in-game verification).
_meta.field_convention: Each constraint is an object {value, source, note}. `value` is what code reads; `source` ∈ {game-truth, community, mixed}; `note` cites the origin.

sources_cited.alliance_bosses: data/static/alliance_bosses.json (CB/Demon Lord base SPD/RES/element per difficulty)
sources_cited.stage_targets: data/static/stage_stat_targets.json via tools/m5_stat_targets.py (per-stage absolute boss RES → ACC floor)
sources_cited.cb_memory: project memory: project_cb_boss_tm_immunity (TM/CC no-op), project_cb_boss_turn_50_bypass (T50 cliff), project_cb_speed_compensating_wrong (UNM SPD 190)

_effect_tags._note: Canonical control/effect tags this table reasons about, mapped to game status_effect_type_id values where applicable. The .py helper normalises synonyms (e.g. tm_drain/tm_fill -> turn_meter) onto these.
_effect_tags.turn_meter: no type id (turn-meter manipulation is a battle action, not a status effect)
_effect_tags.hp_reduction: max-HP reduction (e.g. Maim/Devour-style); no single status id

max_debuffs.note: Standard Raid per-target debuff cap (RSL community); not isolated in static data. Flag for in-game verify.

max_hp_burn.note: HP Burn (Burn, type 470) StackCount=1 in data/static/effects.json — singular, never stacks. CLAUDE.md confirms.

clan_boss.display_name: Clan Boss / Demon Lord (UNM, also NM)
clan_boss.boss_element_note: Boss is Void for the first ~50% HP, then switches to the day's rotated affinity (Magic/Force/Spirit). alliance_bosses.json lists base element 'Spirit'. See memory project_cb_void_first_half_mechanic.

cc_immunities.note: CB/Demon Lord ignores ALL turn-meter manipulation (drains are full no-op; caster does NOT retain would-be-drained TM), Stun/Sleep/Freeze/Provoke/Fear, Decrease SPD, and MAX-HP reduction. Source: project memory project_cb_boss_tm_immunity + CLAUDE.md 'CB is immune to' list.

dot_reactions.note: Poison and HP Burn both work but are per-tick capped on CB to prevent %-max-HP nukes of the ~1.17B boss. Caps from CLAUDE.md / memory project_spirit_fixture_attribution_20260623 (poison 50K/tick, HP burn 75K, WM/GS 67626/proc).

acc_floor.note: From data/static/stage_stat_targets.json (tools/m5_stat_targets.py): AllianceBoss stage number 6 (UNM) effective RES = base 30 + absolute modifier 195 = 225; number 5 (NM) = 30+120 = 150. ACC>=floor lands debuffs at 100% of skill base chance (land = 1+(ACC-RES)*0.01). Community rule-of-thumb 'CB ~230-250' overshoots; game-truth floor is 225.

affinity_rule.note: Affinity advantage/glance applies (gameplay.json ElementDisadvantageCoef -0.2, GlancingHitCoef -0.3). Magic heroes glance vs the boss's Force phase, etc. Glances also gate TM-on-hit passives (e.g. Ninja). See memory project_affinity_table_inversion_fix.

slot_caps.note: max_hp_burn=1 game-truth (effects.json type 470 StackCount=1); 10-debuff/10-poison caps community.

survival_cliff.note: At CB turn 50+ the Demon Lord's enrage skill 222904 IGNORES Block Damage + Unkillable and applies Block Revive; Shield + Damage Reduction are NOT bypassed (stall comps survive via those). Damage ramps DMG×(7.5+turn-19) after turn 20. Source: memory project_cb_boss_turn_50_bypass. Real-game survival pattern: Magic/Spirit/Void reach T50, Force does not (memory).

value: No scripted shield/clone mechanic; pure DoT/hit damage race to the T50 enrage cliff. Boss cycle is [aoe1, aoe2, stun] per element; only the aoe2 skill id + its debuff differ per affinity.

cc_immunities.note: Hydra heads are CC- and turn-meter-immune (multi-head boss; standard RSL community knowledge). Flag for in-game verify against the Hydra head skill/effect immunity lists.

value.poison: varies by head — some heads resist/are immune to poison
value.note_detail: Decapitate / Suppression heads can resist debuffs; Torment head punishes; community-mapped, not yet game-extracted.

dot_reactions.note: Per-head debuff resistance is community knowledge; data/static/hydra.json exists but per-head poison-resist not yet parsed here.

acc_floor.note: Not isolated in stage_stat_targets.json (no Hydra area there). Community: high RES, debuffers want ~300+ ACC for NM/UNM heads. Mark TODO: extract Hydra head RES from data/static/hydra.json.

affinity_rule.note: Affinity/glance applies (gameplay.json coefs). Each head has its own element.

slot_caps.note: hp_burn=1 game-truth; rest community. Hydra has its own counter effects (HydraHitCounter 660, HydraNeckIncreaseDamageTaken 431) per status_effect_type_id.json.

survival_cliff.note: Hydra has a turn/clash damage-window model rather than a hard enrage cliff; not modeled here.

value: Multi-head: heads share an HP pool segment; Head of Torment increases damage taken counters; killing heads / managing the neck (HydraNeckIncreaseDamageTaken 431) matters.
script_notes.note: Flag for in-game verification from data/static/hydra.json head skills.

cc_immunities.note: Chimera (Hydra-like clash boss) is CC/TM-immune per RSL community. Flag for verify against data/static/chimera.json.

value.note_detail: Chimera uses Cocoon (600) / Devour (Devoured 690, Digestion 700) mechanics that remove a champion from the fight; DoTs continue but the cocooned champ is out.

dot_reactions.note: Cocoon/Devour effect ids exist in status_effect_type_id.json; per-skill behaviour not parsed here.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json Chimera area max effective-RES-derived ACC floor = 400 (hardest stage). Lower difficulties lower. NOTE: stage_stat_targets uses base_res=0 for non-AllianceBoss areas, so this is the absolute Resistance modifier; treat as a strong lower bound.

survival_cliff.note: Clash-window model; cocoon/devour are the survival pressure, not a fixed enrage turn.

value: Cocoons (600) a champion (removes them) and Devours; teams need cleanse / cocoon-immunity or fast clears. Same chest/HP-tier reward model as Hydra.

cc_immunities.note: Dragon dungeon boss is NOT CC-immune (Decrease SPD, Decrease ATK all work; this is why Dec-DEF/Weaken/Dec-ATK comps clear). Community standard. Flag for verify.

dot_reactions.note: No special DoT reaction known for the Dragon dungeon boss.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json region DragonsLair max ACC floor = 290 (Dragon 25/hardest). Lower stages lower. Dragon 20 debuffers target ~ this. (stage_stat_targets uses base_res=0 for dungeons → this is the absolute RES modifier.)

value: 3-round structure (5v5 mobs r1+r2, 5v1 boss r3 — memory project_dragon_20_structure). Boss hits hard with AoE; Dec-ATK + Dec-DEF + DEF-stacking standard. Decrease SPD lands (boss is tunable).
script_notes.note: Round structure game-truth (memory); counter approach community.

cc_immunities.note: Spider boss itself takes debuffs; spiderlings spawn each turn. Not CC-immune.

value.note_detail: Spiderlings (adds) heal the boss / sustain it; AoE to clear lings is the key, and damage to lings transfers pressure to the boss.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json region SpiderCave max ACC floor = 290 (hardest stage).

value: Kill the spiderlings — they feed/heal the boss; clearing lings is what lets the boss take damage. AoE + AoE-debuff comps preferred. (community)

cc_immunities.note: Fire Knight takes debuffs. Freeze is specifically USEFUL here (see script_notes), so NOT CC-immune.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json region FireGolemCave (Fire Knight) max ACC floor = 290 (hardest stage).

value: Fire Knight has a Shield that must be broken by a number of HITS (multi-hit / hit-count skills, NOT raw damage) before the boss takes real damage. When FROZEN the boss loses ~15% turn meter. Freeze + multi-hit attackers are the meta. (community — verify hit/shield count + TM-loss from data/static/skills_all.json)

dot_reactions.note: Ice Golem HARD (boss 'Tainted Klyssus') is IMMUNE to Poison and takes +10% extra from HP Burn — so HP-Burn comps are favoured over poison here. From docs/dungeon_farming.md / RSL community. FLAG for in-game verify against data/static/skills_all.json Ice Golem boss passive. This is the headline 'DoT-vs-boss reaction' M3 must encode.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json region IceGolemCave max ACC floor = 290 (hardest stage).

value: Two side-totems / arms mechanic on higher stages. Prefer HP Burn over Poison (poison immune on Hard); HP Burn does +10%. (community)

cc_immunities.note: Doom Tower bosses are broadly CC-immune; verify per-boss.

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json DoomTower area max ACC floor = 300 (game-truth upper bound across DT); per-boss/per-floor value not isolated here. Treat 300 as Hard-floor ceiling; community ~250+ for NM.

value: Magma Dragon: PROVOKE on the boss NEUTRALIZES its Hex/curse mechanic — bring a reliable Provoker. (community — verify from boss skill set)

value.note_detail: Passive REVIVE — HP Burn ticking through the revive window helps finish.

dot_reactions.note: Frost Spider passive revive; HP Burn finishes it. (community — flag for verify)

acc_floor.note: DoomTower area ceiling from stage_stat_targets.json; per-floor not isolated.

value: Spawns spiderlings AND has a passive revive; HP Burn / sustained DoT finishes through the revive. Clear lings. (community)

value.note_detail: Lings apply UNBLOCKABLE Poison to your team; the boss is a poison-DPS fight (Frozen Banshee / poison comps).

dot_reactions.note: Nether Spider broodlings apply unblockable poison to allies; the boss is itself cleared with heavy poison stacking. (community — flag for verify)

value: Spiderlings apply unblockable Poison to your team (need cleanse / high HP). Poison-stacking on the boss is the standard kill (10-poison cap matters). (community)

Eternal Dragon periodically BLOCKS ACTIVE SKILLS (BlockActiveSkills 290) — only A1 / passive damage gets through during that window, so passive-damage and strong-A1 comps are favoured. Wants Decrease ATK to survive its hits. (community — verify against boss skill BlockActiveSkills application)

Scarab King puts a SHIELD on itself before attacking and RETALIATES (counterattack-style) — burst it / break the shield and manage the retaliation. (community — verify Shield 280 + Counterattack/retaliate skill)
Celestial Griffin gains stacks / increasing damage over time and has windows of heavy AoE; sustain + control its ramp. (community — verify from boss skill set)
Dark Fae summons CLONES and casts AoE + Decrease DEF; AoE to clear clones and decrease-DEF amplification on the boss. (community — verify clone summon + Dec-DEF application)

cc_immunities.note: FW bosses (crypt keepers) have ALMIGHTY IMMUNITY: immune to hard CC, but NOT to Decrease SPD or Decrease/Reduce Turn Meter (those DO work). So turn_meter and dec_spd are deliberately NOT in this immunity list. (community — flag for in-game verify)

acc_floor.note: stage_stat_targets.json area 'Fractions' (Faction Wars) max ACC floor = 400 (stage 21/hardest). Lower stages lower.

faction_lock.note: Faction Wars REQUIRES all team members share the boss's faction — this is THE defining hard constraint. The team generator must filter the roster to a single faction (16 factions). Faction membership from data/static/factions.json / hero_types.json fraction field.

value: Single-faction-only (16 factions × 21 stages). Crypt boss has Almighty Immunity to CC; Decrease SPD / Decrease TM still work to control it. (community)

cc_immunities.note: PvP — enemy is another player's team of champions; no boss-level CC immunity. Stun/Freeze/Provoke/TM-control are all HIGH-VALUE here (opposite of CB). Individual champs may bring Block Debuff / immunity sets.

dot_reactions.note: No boss DoT immunity; DoTs work but PvP is decided by speed/nuke, DoTs are rarely the win condition.

acc_floor.note: No fixed boss RES — depends on the opposing defense team's RES. Debuffers want enough ACC to land control (community ~ defense RES + buffer). Not a static floor.

survival_cliff.note: No turn cliff; PvP is a race — usually decided turn 1 (speed + AoE control + nuke).

value: Speed-first: out-speed the enemy, AoE Stun/Freeze/Decrease TM, then nuke. Control effects that are NO-OP on CB are the WIN CONDITION here — the generator must NOT reuse CB's immunity filter for arena.
